title.rendered: The Power of Personal Branding for Founders

content.rendered: Tune into “Marketing In The Now” with host David Reske as he welcomes Shannon Curran, a seasoned marketing advisor and leader from SSC Consulting. This episode dives into the transformative impact of personal branding in the B2B software sector, discussing how founders can utilize their personal brand to elevate their company’s visibility and establish trust with their audience. With her extensive background in brand organizational development and go-to-market strategy, including her role as VP of Marketing at MadKudu, Shannon brings valuable insights into creating compelling narratives that drive revenue and ensure strong market differentiation. The discussion focuses on actionable strategies for founders to showcase their unique stories and values, enhancing their ability to influence and lead their businesses to new heights. Join us to learn how effectively managed personal branding can be a game-changer for founders looking to stand out in competitive markets
